details.test: Task 1: Create COVID project & request largest post-2020 COVID dataset
Task 2: Save three mid-size mental health datasets to favorites
Task 3: Build and save T2D cohort query with US adults and HbA1c lab data
Task 4: Request 3-month access extension for soonest expiring active project
Task 5: Add data analyst collaborator with view-only export permissions
Task 6: Request access to breast cancer genomics dataset with highest variable count (>200 vars)
Task 7: Create and activate customized COVID-19 Outcomes DUA
Task 8: Schedule weekly export of up to 5000 National Diabetes Registry records sorted by patient_id
Task 9: Pin two largest open-access Canadian asthma datasets to dashboard
